title: Port Jervis Upsize Plan
excerpt: A buyer-seller bridge strategy that minimized timing risk and protected negotiating power.
outcome: They secured a larger home and accepted a strong offer on the previous home within 11 days of listing.
results: Closed both transactions on coordinated schedule
titleCn: Port Jervis 换房升级计划
strategy: We sequenced financing pre-approval, targeted off-market previews, and staged listing prep two weeks before launch.
challenge: The family needed to buy a larger home while selling their current property in the same quarter without carrying two mortgages for long.
excerptCn: 通过买卖衔接策略降低时间风险并增强谈判主动权。
outcomeCn: 客户成功购入更大房屋，旧房挂牌后 11 天内收到并接受优质报价。
strategyCn: 我们先完成贷款预审，同时安排非公开看房，并在挂牌前两周完成房屋整理与上市准备。
challengeCn: 客户需在同一季度完成“先买后卖”，并尽量避免长期双重房贷压力。

testimonial.quote: The step-by-step planning made a stressful move feel manageable and strategic.
testimonial.title: Seller + Buyer
testimonial.author: A. Carter
testimonial.quoteCn: 整个流程的分步规划，让原本很有压力的换房过程变得可控且有策略。
